post.subject: Bonjour?
post.body:
Its 09:10am. We're leaving in about an hr to the airport. The plane leaves at about 12. Im all packed. Im lookin forward to it very much! 

The forecast is as follows:

Today - Showers - High 21 - Low 11
Tomorrow - Partly cloudy - High 23 - Low 15
Saturday - Light rain - High 21 - Low 9
Sunday - Partly Cloudy - High 21 - Low 9
Monday - Scattered Showers - High 20 - Low 11

Damn... it could be better. Aw well.
